description_long: This airplane features a sleek, futuristic design with a streamlined white fuselage accented by blue and teal highlights. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted high on the body, with distinctive upward-angled winglets and integrated engine nacelles. The cockpit is positioned at the front, enclosed with a dark canopy, and appears to be a single-seat configuration. The tail section is compact, with twin vertical stabilizers and a subtle dihedral angle. The landing gear is minimal and appears to be retractable, with small units visible beneath the wings. The overall appearance suggests a high-performance, possibly conceptual or advanced urban aircraft.
description: A sleek, futuristic white airplane with swept high-mounted wings, blue and teal accents, and a compact twin-tail design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the high-mounted swept wings with upward winglets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, high wing placement, and visible engine nacelles integrated into the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, compact tail section, and the dihedral angle of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the aerodynamic profile and minimal landing gear beneath the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, sharply swept with upward-angled winglets and slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a compact, conventional tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with small main and nose units visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark canopy.
